title: D&D Ability Scores
description: A mod that adds Dungeons And Dragons ability scores to Minecraft
body:
**This mod is still in beta**

The mod adds Dungeons and Dragons ability scores to Minecraft.

Currently very basic, but there is much more planned.

Press Z to see your scores

You can use _/setstat_ to change your scores



**Planned features include:**

High charisma giving a chance of twins in mob breeding

High wisdom giving night vision and the ability to remove curses

High intelligence giving the ability to craft normally uncraftable things

Intelligence improving XP gain (note: intelligence currently does nothing)

Stat-improving items (Knowledge Tome for intelligenge, Protein Shake for strength, Tome Of New Beginnings for a complete reroll/reset)

Curios

Fix dex making no sense


---------------------------------
If you want to see more mod projects like this, Check out my Twitch, where I make mods suggested by chat: [https://www.twitch.tv/modman337](https://www.twitch.tv/modman337)

You can also suggest things and report bugs on my discord: [https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD](https://discord.gg/MwjqnG3UqD)
